name: Enterprise AI Lead Intelligence & Outreach System

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "llama-3.3-70b-versatile",
  "messages": [
    {"role": "system", "content": "You are a B2B sales intelligence AI. Analyze the lead and respond ONLY with valid JSON (no markdown, no backticks): {"intent": "buying|researching|comparing|just_looking", "intent_confidence": 0.0-1.0, "pain_points": ["point1", "point2"], "buying_stage": "awareness|consideration|decision", "icp_fit": "perfect|good|partial|poor"}"},
    {"role": "user", "content": {{ JSON.stringify('Lead: ' + $json.name + '
Company: ' + ($json.company || 'Unknown') + '
Domain: ' + $json.email_domain + '
Title: ' + ($json.job_title || 'N/A') + '
Budget: ' + ($json.budget ? '$' + $json.budget : 'N/A') + ' (' + $json.budget_tier + ')
Team size: ' + ($json.team_size || 'N/A') + '
Industry: ' + ($json.industry || 'N/A') + '
Message: ' + ($json.message || 'None') + '
Source: ' + $json.source + '
Score: ' + $json.lead_score + '/100 (' + $json.tier + ')') }}}
  ],
  "max_tokens": 200,
  "temperature": 0.2
}

parameters.jsCode:
const d = $input.first().json;
const ai = d.ai_intent;
const co = d.ai_company;

const lines = [
  '🏆 ENTERPRISE LEAD [P0]',
  '━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━',
  '',
  '👤 ' + d.name + (d.job_title ? ' — ' + d.job_title : ''),
  '🏢 ' + (d.company || 'Unknown') + ' [' + co.company_type + ']',
  '📧 ' + d.email,
  d.phone ? '📱 ' + d.phone : '',
  '',
  '📊 Score: ' + d.lead_score + '/100 | Priority: ' + d.priority,
  '💰 Budget: ' + (d.budget ? d.currency + ' ' + d.budget.toLocaleString() : 'N/A') + ' [' + d.budget_tier + ']',
  '',
  '🤖 AI ANALYSIS',
  '  Intent: ' + ai.intent + ' (' + (ai.intent_confidence * 100).toFixed(0) + '%)',
  '  Stage: ' + ai.buying_stage + ' | ICP: ' + ai.icp_fit,
  '  Pain: ' + ai.pain_points.join(', '),
  '',
  '🏭 COMPANY INTEL',
  '  ' + co.likely_industry + ' | ' + co.estimated_employees + ' employees',
  '  Tech: ' + co.tech_sophistication,
  '  ' + co.key_insight,
  '',
  '✉️ SUGGESTED OUTREACH',
  '━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━',
  d.ai_outreach,
  '━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━',
  '',
  '⚡ SLA: ' + d.sla_minutes + ' min | Team: ' + d.assigned_team,
  '🔗 Source: ' + d.source,
  '🆔 ' + d.lead_id
].filter(Boolean).join('\n');

return [{ json: { ...d, notification: lines, alert_level: 'P0_ENTERPRISE' } }];

// AUDIT TRAIL — Full processing record
const d = $('8. Merge All Intelligence').first().json;
return [{ json: {
  event: 'lead_processed',
  lead_id: d.lead_id,
  email: d.email,
  score: d.lead_score,
  tier: d.tier,
  priority: d.priority,
  intent: d.ai_intent.intent,
  intent_confidence: d.ai_intent.intent_confidence,
  buying_stage: d.ai_intent.buying_stage,
  icp_fit: d.ai_intent.icp_fit,
  company_type: d.ai_company.company_type,
  assigned_team: d.assigned_team,
  sla_minutes: d.sla_minutes,
  source: d.source,
  alert_level: d.alert_level,
  ai_calls: d.total_ai_calls,
  processing_time_ms: Date.now() - new Date(d.ingested_at).getTime(),
  pipeline_version: d.pipeline_version,
  timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
}}];

parameters.responseBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  success: true,
  lead_id: $('8. Merge All Intelligence').first().json.lead_id,
  score: $('8. Merge All Intelligence').first().json.lead_score,
  tier: $('8. Merge All Intelligence').first().json.tier,
  priority: $('8. Merge All Intelligence').first().json.priority,
  intent: $('8. Merge All Intelligence').first().json.ai_intent.intent,
  buying_stage: $('8. Merge All Intelligence').first().json.ai_intent.buying_stage,
  company_type: $('8. Merge All Intelligence').first().json.ai_company.company_type,
  assigned_team: $('8. Merge All Intelligence').first().json.assigned_team,
  sla_minutes: $('8. Merge All Intelligence').first().json.sla_minutes,
  outreach_generated: true,
  ai_calls: 3,
  pipeline_version: '3.0'
}) }}
